purpose: How the frontend integrates with the Work Mode microservice.

stateMapping.note: Abort is not implemented for analyze in the current React client.

autosave.successBehavior: Replace local WorkPlanRecord with server response and set autosaveStatus=saved.
autosave.staleVersionBehavior: Show stale version error, preserve local draft, and use GET /work-plans/:id when recovery UI is added.
autosave.networkFailureBehavior: Keep local draft and set autosaveStatus=failed.

abortBehavior.analyze: Not implemented in the current UI; can be added with AbortController later.
abortBehavior.generate: AbortController cancels the HTTP request. Main WorkModeUiState returns to approved and generationStatus becomes cancelled.
abortBehavior.backendRequirement: Current route checks for client disconnect before persisting generated output.

websocketDecision.reason: No realtime collaborative editing or bidirectional tool control is needed.
websocketDecision.futureUpgrade: Add SSE before WebSocket if the only requirement is one-way answer streaming.

frontendErrors.cors_origin_blocked: Show backend/CORS setup hint and keep local state.
frontendErrors.validation_error: Show editable prompt or selection error.
frontendErrors.prompt_too_long: Ask user to shorten prompt below 8000 characters.
frontendErrors.analysis_not_found: Ask user to re-run prompt analysis.
frontendErrors.unknown_module_id: Remove invalid module selection and retry.
frontendErrors.stale_work_plan_version: Preserve local edits and recover latest server record.
frontendErrors.work_plan_not_draft: Refresh current plan status before approving.
frontendErrors.generation_cancelled: Return to approved state with retry available.
